questions.question: Which property adds shadow to text?
questions.explanation: text-shadow adds shadow to text content. box-shadow adds shadow to the element box.

questions.question: How do you show ellipsis (...) for overflowing text?
questions.explanation: text-overflow: ellipsis shows ... when text overflows. Must be paired with overflow: hidden and white-space: nowrap.

questions.question: Which property controls the spacing between characters?
questions.explanation: letter-spacing controls space between characters. word-spacing controls space between words.

questions.question: What is the default text-align value for LTR languages?
questions.explanation: The default text-align for left-to-right languages (like English) is 'left'.

questions.question: Which property adds an underline, overline, or line-through to text?
questions.explanation: text-decoration adds decorative lines to text: underline, overline, line-through, or a combination.

questions.question: What does text-transform: capitalize do?
options: Capitalizes the first letter of each word
questions.explanation: text-transform: capitalize capitalizes the first letter of each word while leaving the rest unchanged.

questions.question: Which property controls the space between lines of text?
questions.explanation: line-height controls the space between lines of text. It can be set with unitless numbers, lengths, or percentages.

questions.question: What does text-indent do?
options: Indents the first line of text in a block
Indents all lines except the first
questions.explanation: text-indent indents only the first line of a block-level element, commonly used for paragraphs.

questions.question: How do you prevent text from wrapping to the next line?
questions.explanation: white-space: nowrap prevents text from wrapping to the next line, keeping it on one line.

questions.question: What does word-spacing affect?
questions.explanation: word-spacing controls the amount of space between words in text content.

questions.question: Which property is used to break long words to prevent overflow?
questions.explanation: Both word-break and overflow-wrap (formerly word-wrap) can break long words to prevent overflow, with slightly different behaviors.

questions.question: What is the correct syntax for text-shadow?
questions.explanation: text-shadow order: horizontal-offset vertical-offset blur-radius color. e.g., text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);

questions.question: What does text-align: justify do?
options: Stretches text to align with both left and right edges
questions.explanation: justify spreads text evenly so both left and right edges are aligned with the container, like newspaper columns.

questions.question: How do you change the color of selected text?
questions.explanation: The ::selection pseudo-element styles text that the user has selected/highlighted.

questions.question: What does text-transform: uppercase do?
options: Capitalizes the first letter of each word
Reverses the case of each letter
questions.explanation: text-transform: uppercase converts every letter in the selected text to uppercase.

questions.question: Which property controls the direction of text (LTR/RTL)?
questions.explanation: The direction property (values: ltr, rtl) controls text direction for different language scripts.

questions.question: What is white-space: pre used for?
options: Preserves whitespace and line breaks like in a <pre> element
Prevents the element from being hidden
questions.explanation: white-space: pre preserves spaces and line breaks in the source code, displaying them literally.

questions.question: What does text-decoration-thickness control?
options: The thickness of the font stroke
The thickness of the underline/overline/line-through line
The thickness of the text shadow
questions.explanation: text-decoration-thickness sets the thickness of the decoration line (underline, overline, etc.) in CSS Text Decoration Level 4.

questions.question: What does vertical-align control for inline elements?
options: Vertical alignment relative to surrounding text
questions.explanation: vertical-align controls how an inline element aligns vertically relative to surrounding text or its parent.

questions.question: Which property would you use to change the case of text?
questions.explanation: text-transform changes text case with values like uppercase, lowercase, and capitalize.
